data.title: American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN) Launches Government Procurement Services Segment and Announces Initial Transaction Supporting Canadian Defense Requirement
data.description: An American Fusion company has recently expanded its services to include government procurement, with a particular focus on supporting Canadian defense needs. The company has announced its first transaction in this segment, which aims to address the defense requirements of Canada. This new venture signifies a strategic move for American Fusion, as it looks to tap into the government procurement industry. The transaction is a significant milestone for the company as it establishes its presence in this sector.

data.title: CLICK (NASDAQ: CLIK) Secures Low-Cost Entry into the US$300B Greater Bay Area Silver Economy via Flash Mutual Acquisition, US$2.5M Profit Guarantee & “Life Care Robot” Expected to Deliver Over 50% Incremental Profit Surge in 2027
data.description: Hong Kong based Click Holdings Limited, a prominent provider of human resources and senior care solutions, has recently disclosed the signing of a crucial Memorandum of Understanding (MOU). The MOU involves the acquisition of a 15% ownership stake in Flash Mutual Technology (International) Company Limited for a total of US$0.64 million. Flash Mutual Technology serves as the offshore arm of Flash Mutual (Guangdong) Co., Limited, with a primary focus on the Greater Bay Area (GBA) silver economy. This move represents Click's inaugural venture into the GBA region, particularly targeting the Guangzhou area and neighboring areas.

data.title: Enlivex Treasury Update: Total RAIN Holdings Rise to 78,819,756,062 Tokens as of April 27, 2026, Representing an Aggregated Value of $567 Million
data.description: Enlivex recently announced significant new acquisitions from Rain Foundation as part of their strategic treasury plan focused on prediction markets. This move emphasizes Enlivex's disciplined approach to strengthening their treasury, with the acquisitions totaling an impressive sum of [specific amount] USD. The decision showcases Enlivex's commitment to enhancing their financial position and capitalizing on growth opportunities in the market.

data.title: Fabric.AI (Nasdaq: SBLX) Launches Breakthrough MicroLED Interconnect Technology as First Step in Building Next-Generation “AI Factory” Infrastructure. Partners with Leading MicroLED Developer Kopin Corporation (Nasdaq: KOPN)
data.description: A cutting-edge set of fabless semiconductor technologies has been unveiled with the aim of fueling AI factories - innovative data centers specialized in generating intelligence on a large scale. The primary emphasis will be on developing MicroLED optical interconnects, as a strategic move to dominate the industry valued at over $100 billion. This initiative is being carried out in collaboration with Kopin Corporation, the sole entity capable of manufacturing programmable MicroLEDs. Under the terms of the partnership, Kopin Corporation is set to acquire a 19.9% stake in Fabric.AI, the entity overseeing this technological advancement.

data.title: TOMI Environmental Solutions to Present at Wall Street Reporter’s NEXT SUPER STOCK Livestream Today, April 28, 2026, at 1 p.m. ET
data.description: A livestream event is set to showcase TOMI’s cutting-edge innovation acceleration business model and global decontamination growth strategy. The event will feature insights into TOMI’s strategies for expansion and development, emphasizing their commitment to innovation and growth. Viewers can expect in-depth discussions on TOMI's unique approach to accelerating business growth and their plans for global decontamination. This livestream aims to provide a comprehensive look at TOMI’s strategies and goals, highlighting their global impact and drive for innovation. Stay tuned for valuable insights into TOMI's business model and plans for future growth in the decontamination industry.

data.title: BrandPilot AI Appoints Jordan Brooks to Advisory Board
data.description: A recent appointment has enhanced the company's product strategy and platform development capabilities. This move is aimed at boosting innovation and growth within the organization. With a focus on expanding product offerings and improving overall platform functionality, the new appointment brings a wealth of experience to the team. This strategic decision is expected to increase efficiencies and drive success in the fiercely competitive market. The company is optimistic about achieving its goals and objectives with this strengthened leadership in place.

data.title: Jyong Biotech Updates Market Access Strategy for Innovative Botanical Drugs, Establishing Multiple Competitive Advantages for New Drug Portfolio
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in New Taipei City, Taiwan, Jyong Biotech Ltd. (Nasdaq: MENS) revealed its progress in market access strategies for plant-based drugs Botreso ® and PCP. The biotechnology company, known for its focus on innovative plant-derived therapeutics, conducted an analysis of the drugs' clinical efficacy and competitive edge. This step signifies a significant development in the commercialization of these medications.

data.title: New location leased by TruGolf LINKS Regional Developer, marking a significant milestone in expansion plans.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 7.9%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. The government has stated that this is a concerning trend and they are taking steps to address the issue. Additionally, the report found that inflation has risen by 3.2% in the past year, putting further strain on the economy. Experts predict that these challenges will have long-lasting effects on the overall financial stability of the nation. The government has promised to implement measures to stimulate job growth and combat rising inflation in the upcoming months.

data.title: KULR Welcomes Microsoft Director and Pricing Optimization Specialist to Board of Directors
data.description: KULR Technology Group has recently welcomed two new members to its Board of Directors: Mr. Ben Frank, a former director at Microsoft, and Dr. Mike Kimel, an expert in pricing and profit optimization. The appointments are part of KULR's strategic efforts to enhance its corporate governance and leverage the expertise of industry leaders. Both Mr. Frank and Dr. Kimel bring a wealth of experience to the board, with Mr. Frank's background at a tech giant like Microsoft and Dr. Kimel's specialization in maximizing pricing strategies for improved profitability. These additions are expected to contribute significantly to KULR's growth and decision-making processes moving forward.

data.title: PolyPid to Present Data from SHIELD II Phase 3 Trial Demonstrating Reduced Severity of Surgical Site Infection at Surgical Infection Society 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Research findings show a significant decrease in the severity of surgical wound infections after abdominal colorectal surgery. This reduction is statistically significant and has the potential to lower hospital resource utilization. The study highlights the importance of implementing strategies to prevent infection in surgical procedures, ultimately benefiting both patients and healthcare facilities.
BREAKING: UAE decides to exit OPEC and OPEC+

data.title: Bitcoin's fate tied to $82K CME Gap amid earnings, FOMC uncertainty. Tech earnings, FOMC affect investor risk, $82K crucial for Bitcoin upswing.
data.description: Strong performances by major technology companies and the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) decisions are creating uncertainty among investors, impacting risk tolerance. Bitcoin's potential recovery rally hinges on surpassing $82,000, a critical level for its trajectory.

data.title: CirrusMD Redefines the Point of Care: Immediate, Physician-First, Continuous, and Connected
data.description: CirrusMD, a Quantum Health subsidiary based in Dublin, Ohio, has introduced a novel approach to virtual primary care, aiming to reach patients at an earlier stage in their healthcare journey. The new model goes beyond traditional care delivery methods by emphasizing the importance of initial interactions, with significant potential to lower healthcare expenses and enhance outcomes for both employers and individuals. Research indicates that approximately 33% of Americans face challenges in accessing regular healthcare services, leading to soaring costs across the healthcare system.

data.title: Q4 Launches AI-Native CRM, Transforming How Investor Relationships Are Managed
data.description: In Toronto, Q4 Inc. announced the introduction of AI-native CRM features in its investor relations platform. This development signifies a significant change in how public companies handle and utilize investor engagement data. Through this update, IR teams can now streamline tasks such as data entry and reporting, enabling them to access real-time insights. This allows for better meeting preparation, tailored engagement strategies, and improved communication with investors.

data.title: AmplifAI and TTEC Collaborate to Advance AI-Driven Performance Through TTEC Perform™
data.description: A technology company based in Plano, Texas, has announced that their AI-driven platform for automated quality assurance, coaching, and customer experience management is now being utilized by TTEC Perform™ on a large scale. The platform provided by AmplifAI aims to streamline processes and improve performance across various business sectors utilizing advanced technologies.

data.title: Tyfone Expands Check Fraud Protection Capabilities with Mitek Systems’ Check Fraud Defender
data.description: A company based in Portland, Oregon, Tyfone, has recently announced the enhancement of their check fraud protection services by integrating Mitek Systems’ Check Fraud Defender. This collaboration aims to bolster the capabilities of Tyfone in preventing check fraud incidents. With this new system in place, Tyfone is expected to offer improved security measures to its clients.
BREAKING: The UAE will leave OPEC and OPEC+ as of May 1 - State News Agency.

data.title: Stem Acquires raicoon to Expand PowerTrack Capabilities
data.description: In Houston, Stem, Inc. (NYSE: STEM) revealed the acquisition of raicoon GmbH's software assets, a company from Vienna specializing in automated fault detection for solar asset performance. This move is set to boost Stem's PowerTrack™ platform by advancing data analysis for operational efficiency. Stem aims to improve customer ability to recognize, prioritize, and address performance issues through this acquisition.

data.title: Sonida Senior Living Publishes Letter to Shareholders in Connection with 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Dallas-based Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (NYSE: SNDA), a prominent owner, operator, and investor in senior living communities, has released its definitive proxy materials for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The meeting is set to take place on June 11, 2026. The company has filed these materials with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and is also sending a letter to shareholders in connection with the meeting.
